title: Untrusted Assets, Save Parsing, Paths, Privacy, and Local Security · Program Brief: Path Admission
summary: A mod folder escapes its root, decompression consumes memory, pickle loads scores, save files are unlimited, crash reports include home paths, and telemetry starts without consent. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the path admission increment in bounded local-data and privacy policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, ch…
objectives: Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.
Identify protected player data and availability, untrusted files and paths, package supply chain, local attackers, and realistic consequences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. A defensible solution applies Path Admission, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to bounded local-data and privacy policy.

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-path-admission — Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-security-save-assets-4
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-security-save-assets-4.
# Case 1655: a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling.
# Operating constraint: test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases.
# Changed case: inject a 400 millisecond frame stall and prove the update budget prevents a spiral of death.
def worked_asteroids_security_save_assets_4(untrusted_paths: int = 6, rejected_paths: int = 6, save_size: int = 4096, save_limit: int = 65536, remote_content: bool = False, telemetry_opt_in: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "playerworked4",
        "seed1655",
        "input4dekrow",
        "frameworked41655",
        "state1655worked4",
        "playtest4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if untrusted_paths < 0 or rejected_paths < 0:
        return False, rejected_paths, "security-domain"
    if rejected_paths != untrusted_paths:
        return False, rejected_paths, "path-admission"
    if save_size < 0 or save_size > save_limit:
        return False, save_size, "save-budget"
    if remote_content or not telemetry_opt_in:
        return False, save_size, "external-data"
    assert save_size <= save_limit
    return True, rejected_paths, "bounded-local-data"

# Evidence: asteroids-path-admission-6l7j0q
# Competency: asteroids-path-admission.
# Case 8497: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity.

def evidence_asteroids_path_admission_6l7j0q(untrusted_paths: int = 6, rejected_paths: int = 6, save_size: int = 4096, save_limit: int = 65536, remote_content: bool = False, telemetry_opt_in: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_6l7j0q = "6l7j0q-q0j7l6-8497"

        "player6l7j0q",
        "seed8497",
        "inputq0j7l6",
        "frame6l7j0q8497",
        "state84976l7j0q",
        "playtestq0j7l68497",

stimulus.title: Path Admission case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A theory Asteroids team handles case 3367 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Joining a trusted directory with a filename prevents path escape.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations. Artifact under review: bounded local-data and privacy policy.

options.text: For inspect path admission evidence, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof. This does not satisfy Path Admission for bounded local-data and privacy policy.
The record names the assumption, applies Path Admission, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Path Admission record says bounded local-data and privacy policy looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect path admission evidence boundary for Path Admission.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.
